name: Shanghai Lingang Holdings Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shanghai Lingang Holdings Co.,Ltd. develops, rents, and sells industrial carriers in China. The company's industrial carriers portfolio include technology research and development buildings, headquarters business buildings, bonded logistics warehouses, etc. It is also involved in the park operations and industrial investment activities. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Automation Instrumentation Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanghai Lingang Holdings Co.,Ltd in November 2015. Shanghai Lingang Holdings Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Shanghai, China.
